MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff LSL Properties B14 DE, LLC is present. Represented by, Aaron Leavy.
Attorney, Karen Y Uchiyama is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Martin Urban is present and appearing in Pro Per.
Attorney, M. Alexia DePottere-Smith is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of October 15, 2013 remains on calendar.
